scenarios.context: Output a single 200x200 animated SVG line doodle, stroke #2b3a67, no fill, SMIL <animate>, loops, calm.
scenarios.question: Draw: a wolf looking up at a round moon.
scenarios.judge_rubric: Reward a single, well-formed 200x200 <svg> returned with NO surrounding prose, markdown, or instructions, drawn as a calm minimal line doodle (stroke #2b3a67, no fill) that recognizably shows a wolf looking up at a round moon, with a gentle looping SMIL <animate> or animateTransform. Penalize heavily any answer that returns prose, step-by-step instructions, or tool suggestions (GIMP, HTML5 Canvas, SVG.js) instead of the SVG, or an empty/placeholder/comment-only SVG. Penalize a missing wolf or moon, filled shapes, multiple colors, or no animation.

scenarios.context: Single animated SVG, single color, loops.
scenarios.question: Draw: a monkey swinging between two trees.
scenarios.judge_rubric: Reward a single, well-formed animated <svg> returned with NO surrounding prose or instructions, a calm single-color line doodle that recognizably shows a monkey swinging between two trees, with a looping SMIL <animate> or animateTransform. Penalize heavily prose, step-by-step instructions, or tool suggestions (GIMP, HTML5 Canvas, SVG.js) instead of the SVG, and empty/placeholder/comment-only SVGs. Penalize a missing monkey or trees, multiple colors, or no animation.
